# APRS corpus — one packet per line, each representing a packet type the
# parser must handle. Lines beginning with '#' or blank are ignored.
# Format: <expected_type>|<info_field>
#
# These are synthesised from the APRS Protocol Reference v1.0.1 and
# real-world examples documented in the direwolf source tree. Live
# 144.39 captures (see ../../aprs-test-tracks/*.flac) can be added
# alongside once the modem IPC round-trip is wired end-to-end in Phase 4.

position|!4903.50N/07201.75W-Test status
position|=4903.50N/07201.75W>Mobile /A=001234
position|@092345z4903.50N/07201.75W-Timestamped
position|!4903.50N/07201.75W>088/036Course and speed
message|:W1AW     :Hello, World{001
message|:N0CALL   :ack042
message|:BLN1     :Monthly net Wed 2000z
telemetry|T#123,100,200,300,400,500,10110000
weather|_10090556c220s004g005t077r000p000P000h50b09900wRSW
weather|!4903.50N/07201.75W_220/004g005t077r000p000P000h50b09900
object|;LEADER   *092345z4903.50N/07201.75W>Object demo
object|;DEADOBJ  _092345z4903.50N/07201.75W>Killed
item|)AID#2!4903.50N/07201.75W-Aid station
item|)WRECK_4903.50N/07201.75W>Killed item
capabilities|<IGATE,MSG_CNT=0,LOC_CNT=12>
status|>Net Control Active
query|?APRS?
thirdparty|}N0CALL>APRS,TCPIP*,qAC,T2USA:=4903.50N/07201.75W-
# Direction-finding appendix (APRS101 ch 7): "/BRG/NRQ".
position|!4903.50N/07201.75W\/088/729DF station
# Snowfall (s after g per direwolf decode_aprs.c) + raw rain counter #.
weather|_10090556c220s004g010s012t077#0123h50b09900
# Software+unit identifier tag trailing a weather report.
weather|_10090556c220s004g005t077h50b09900xOWRD
# Negative temperature in positionless weather.
weather|_10090556c220s004g005t-14h50b09900
# Telemetry metadata messages (APRS101 ch 13).
telemetry|:N0CALL   :PARM.Battery,BTemp,AirTemp,Pres,Alt
telemetry|:N0CALL   :UNIT.V,deg.F,deg.F,Mbar,Meters
telemetry|:N0CALL   :EQNS.0,0.01,0,0,0.1,-30,0,0.1,-30,0,0.1,0,0,1,0
telemetry|:N0CALL   :BITS.11111111,Weather Balloon
# Real-world packet shapes from hessu/perl-aprs-fap t/*.t corpus.
# Source: https://github.com/hessu/perl-aprs-fap/tree/main/t (BSD-style licensed).
weather|!4903.50N/07201.75W_220/000g000t077r000p000P000h42b10147wRSW
position|@092345z4903.50N/07201.75W>088/036/A=001234Course alt
message|:EMAIL-2  :kc7xyz@example.com Hello from APRS
